name: Tambora Linear 100
comment: Following on from its successful range of LED bars introduced last year, Claypaky has now expanded the Tambora family further and introduces Tambora Linear 100, an advanced line of static LED Pixel mapping bars designed for versatile lighting effects and artistic set decoration.
